---

A creator sets up a **Quest** — a structured learning path with milestones like *"Build your first API"* or *"Deploy a smart contract."* They fund it with tokens. Learners enroll, complete milestones, get verified, and earn. The smart contracts handle everything: escrow, verification, and payout.

**No backend. No middleman. Just Stellar smart contracts and a React frontend.**

<br />

<p align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lernza/lernza/main/.github/assets/how-it-works.svg" alt="How Lernza works: Create → Fund → Learn → Earn" width="100%" />
</p>

<br />

### Built with

**Soroban** (Rust smart contracts on Stellar) · **React 19** · **TypeScript** · **Tailwind CSS v4** · **Freighter Wallet**

### Get involved

We're building Lernza in the open and welcome contributors at every level.

- **[Good first issues](https://github.com/lernza/lernza/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+label%3A%22good+first+issue%22)** — tagged and ready to pick up
- **[Project board](https://github.com/orgs/lernza/projects/1)** — see what's in progress
- **[Contributing guide](https://github.com/lernza/lernza/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)** — conventions, setup, PR guidelines
